_comment: Local end-to-end rehearsal on the cached Qwen3.5-0.8B. Exercises the full vectors -> intervene -> judge4 -> fig4 path on a small model before trusting 9B results. use_judged=false: 0.8b only has activations/, no judge_activations/. Its .pt are the older 22-slot layout, but slots 0/1 are the same as on the 25-slot 9b, so the vectors stage is exercised identically.
